reference: I am sixteen years old and have had a lump in my right nipple for about a month now. About an hour ago, I was squeezing it, and a small amount of clear fluid discharged from multiple openings in my nipple. I had lung surgery six months ago, and I am currently on acne medication. Is there any reason to worry?
